ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure with the bank in years */,
  "balance" REAL /* Account balance of the customer */,
  "num_of_products" INTEGER /* Number of products held by the customer */,
  "has_cr_card" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has a credit card */,
  "is_active_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is an active member */,
  "estimated_salary" REAL /* Estimated annual salary of the customer */,
  "exited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has exited the bank */,
  "income_band" TEXT /* Income band of the customer (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the account */,
  "date_opened" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the customer */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact made with the customer */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method used for contacting the customer (e.g., Email, Call) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score to measure customer interaction with the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_engagement_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Loan, Credit Card) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-product relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product they hold */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date when the customer acquired the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exit_analysis" (
  "exit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exit record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who exited */,
  "exit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exit */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer exited */,
  "exit_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exit_analysis_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentation" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., high-value, low-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product performance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the product */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the product */,
  "customer_acquisition_cost" REAL /* Cost of acquiring a customer for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer satisfaction record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Satisfaction score (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "satisfaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the satisfaction score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_satisfaction_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_result" TEXT /* Result of the prediction (e.g., churn, non-churn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_privacy" (
  "privacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data privacy record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "data_sharing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer allows data sharing */,
  "communication_preferences" TEXT /* Communication preferences of the customer (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_privacy_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
